---
title: "ui best practices"
author: "Haley Faucher"
date: "2026-07-08"
---

# Best Practices
- Indent properly!! It makes reading through the UI to find specific items much easier
    - Also make sure the parenthesis are easy to locate/keep track of.
- Keep styling consistent
    - "primary" for all dropdown tabs
- Keep larger texts in global (like paragraphs about methods)
